analysis_result: Using gseapy prerank on MPNST-G1 (n=6) vs MPNST-G2 (n=6) with the HALLMARK WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING gene set, NES = -0.942 and FDR q-val = 0.845 (NOM p-val = 0.536; direction: depleted in G1 vs G2). Using the prompt-specified 10-gene WNT set (9 found in matrix), NES = 0.566 and FDR = 0.969. In neither recalculation is the WNT pathway significantly enriched in MPNST-G1 at FDR<0.25. Note: the paper's Figure 3d reports WNT pathway enrichment in MPNST-G1 as significant; the exact NES/FDR shown in Figure 3d cannot be read from the underlying data without reading the figure itself, and our gseapy prerank recomputation does not reproduce a significant enrichment.
denominator_used: 12 MPNST tumors total (6 MPNST-G1: M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M803; 6 MPNST-G2: M1677, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413). G2 sample M1933 in MOESM4 lacks a matching RNA-seq column in GSE207400_Matrix. 14992 ranked genes.
assumptions_made: Ranking metric was pooled-SE two-sample t-statistic on log-normalized expression (G1 minus G2; positive stat means up in G1); duplicate gene symbols de-duplicated to the row with max |stat|; gseapy prerank with permutation_num=1000 and seed=42; MSigDB_Hallmark_2020 collection used for HALLMARK_WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING; M1933 (no RNA column) excluded; WNT1 absent from expression matrix so prompt-specified set reduced from 10 to 9 genes; direction convention MPNST-G1 vs MPNST-G2 means positive NES = enriched in G1; paper's exact GSEA method/gene set may differ (e.g., fgsea with different ranking, different MSigDB version, or a curated WNT set) and cannot be perfectly reproduced without access to the paper's code.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz: bulk RNA-seq log-normalized matrix, 14995 genes x 48 samples
   - 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx 'Clinical Data' sheet: 108 tumors, 15 columns incl. Tumor_ID, Methylation_Group, RNA-Seq, RNA label

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Select rows with RNA-Seq=='X' -> 49 samples (48 matrix columns + M1933 which has no matrix column)
   - Filter to Methylation_Group in {MPNST_G1, MPNST_G2} -> 13 (6 G1 + 7 G2)
   - Intersect Tumor_IDs with matrix column names -> 12 (6 G1: M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M803; 6 G2: M1677, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413). G2 sample M1933 dropped (no RNA column).

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Methylation_Group: categorical {MPNST_G1, MPNST_G2}
   - Gene expression: log-normalized values from GSE207400_Matrix
   - Ranking metric: pooled-SE t-statistic per gene: (mean_G1 - mean_G2) / sqrt(sd_G1^2/6 + sd_G2^2/6); positive = up in G1
   - 14992 ranked genes after dropping NA and de-duplicating on symbol

D. COMPUTATION
   - gseapy.prerank(rnk=ranked_list, gene_sets='MSigDB_Hallmark_2020', min_size=5, max_size=1000, permutation_num=1000, seed=42)
   - Also ran: WikiPathway_2021_Human, KEGG_2021_Human, prompt-specified 10-gene set (WNT1, WNT3, WNT5A, CTNNB1, TCF7, LEF1, AXIN2, MYC, CCND1, APC; WNT1 absent from matrix so 9 used), and a custom curated 61-gene WNT list (WNT ligands + FZDs + LRPs + CTNNB1 + TCF/LEF + AXIN/APC + DKK/SFRP + MYC/CCND + RSPO/LGR + SOX9 + DVL/GSK3B + PORCN)

E. RESULT
   - HALLMARK Wnt-beta Catenin Signaling (primary answer): ES = -0.272, NES = -0.942, NOM p-val = 0.536, FDR q-val = 0.845, FWER p-val = 1.00. Tag 11/40, Gene % 18.74%. Leading-edge (negative tail): NUMB; FRAT1; TCF7; NOTCH4; HDAC11; NOTCH1; ADAM17; PPARD; CSNK1E; PTCH1; AXIN1. Not significant (FDR q-val = 0.845 >> 0.25).
   - Prompt-specified 10-gene WNT set: NES = 0.566, FDR = 0.969 (9 genes used; WNT1 absent). Not significant.
   - KEGG Wnt signaling pathway: NES = 1.18, FDR = 0.454. Not significant.
   - Top WikiPathway hits: 'LncRNA involvement in canonical Wnt signaling and colorectal cancer WP4258' NES = 1.90, FDR = 0.023 (significant); 'ncRNAs involved in Wnt signaling in hepatocellular carcinoma WP4336' NES = 1.59, FDR = 0.131. Core 'Wnt Signaling Pathway WP363' NES = 0.83, FDR = 0.923 (NS).
   - Custom 61-gene curated WNT list: NES = 1.34, FDR = 0.075 (trend; not significant at conventional 0.05 FDR but at FDR<0.25).

F. CAVEATS
   - Only 6 samples per group -> low power for GSEA; permutation-based FDR is conservative.
   - The ranking metric and gene set choice strongly influence NES/FDR. Different plausible choices (Hallmark vs WikiPathway vs custom) give NES ranging from -0.94 to +1.90, illustrating sensitivity.
   - The paper's Figure 3d uses its own GSEA parameters (likely fgsea with log-rank or signal-to-noise ranking and a specific gene set collection, possibly curated) which we cannot perfectly replicate without the paper's code.
   - One MPNST_G2 sample (M1933) was excluded due to missing RNA-seq column in the provided matrix.
   - Since the question asks for the values shown in Figure 3d itself, the definitive answer would require reading the figure; our reproduction gives NES = -0.942, FDR = 0.845 for the HALLMARK WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING set.
